name: Variational meta-learning inference for low dimensional neural system identification

description: arXiv:2607.18965v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deep learning has proven highly effective for nonlinear system identification, but heavily parameterized neural networks are prone to overfitting in low-data regimes and lack reliable uncertainty quantification. The recently developed manifold meta-learning framework addresses the data efficiency problem by restricting the model parameters to a...
author: Matteo Rufolo, Dario Piga, Marco Forgione
